audit_items.proof_trace: s_entered is declared as `bool internal` (L157), which Solidity 0.8.26 constrains to exactly {false, true} with no intermediate values. The bid() function sets it true at entry (L418) and false at exit (L457); the only other access is a read-only check in GPV2CompatibleAuction.isValidSignature(). Since bid() uses no try/catch, any mid-execution revert rolls back s_entered=true entirely via EVM state-revert semantics, so the flag can never be stuck at true.
